findings.description: Forbidden envelope key 'characters' found at top level of series-level character profiles file. Per Schema v1.1.0 §3.4, character_profiles.json contains only per-character entries; envelope fields belong in their canonical homes (intake, book_config, series_config, or series_bible).
findings.suggested_fix: Remove the top-level 'characters' field from series/airmen/character_profiles.json. If the field's content is needed elsewhere, move it to its canonical home per Schema §3.4.
